persona_dream_panel.panel_prompt: Generate one single photorealistic cinematic persona-dream proof panel for Tau issue 31: a focused project agent at a desk reviewing evidence receipts, one laptop glow, paper proof cards, tea steam, subtle surreal sky-eye motif outside the window, no text, no logos, no captions, no UI chrome.

context.summary: Run one bounded persona-dream panel proof through Tau command-loop.

next_agent.name: panel-creator
next_agent.reason: Panel Creator must write a local creator receipt before review.

rationale: The first bounded step is a local panel creator command with receipt output.
required_evidence: Panel creator, reviewer, and repair-gate receipts or the first failed receipt.

result.summary: Human requested the local one-panel persona-dream proof command.

stop_condition: The local proof command writes manifest.json with first_blocker or dry-run Kling request.
